manager.name: Company Intelligence Manager
manager.description: Coordinates all sub-agents, routes the company name query to each, aggregates results into a unified company profile with summary, reviews, sentiment, and details
manager.agent_role: Senior Intelligence Coordinator and Report Synthesizer

sub_agents.name: Instagram & Facebook Agent
sub_agents.description: Searches for the company's Instagram and Facebook pages, scrapes public posts, engagement metrics, follower counts, reviews, and ratings from Meta platforms
sub_agents.agent_role: Social Media Intelligence Analyst specializing in Meta platforms (Instagram and Facebook)

sub_agents.name: X/Twitter Intelligence Agent
sub_agents.description: Searches for the company's Twitter/X profile and recent mentions, scrapes follower count, post engagement, public sentiment, trending topics, and news mentions
sub_agents.agent_role: Social Media Intelligence Analyst specializing in X/Twitter platform

sub_agents.name: Google Insights Agent
sub_agents.description: Searches Google for company reviews, Google Business Profile data, recent news articles, press releases, contact details, and general business information
sub_agents.agent_role: Business Intelligence Analyst specializing in Google search and business data

sub_agents.name: Alternative Sources Agent
sub_agents.description: Searches LinkedIn, company websites, Glassdoor, business directories, and other public sources for employee sentiment, company details, and supplementary information
sub_agents.agent_role: Alternative Intelligence Analyst specializing in LinkedIn, Glassdoor, and business directories
